{{CargoRelic
|name=Dragon Medal
|class_id=20030
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This is a medal inherited from a noble family that has existed for thousands of years. Even though the descendants have left their homeland, their pride never wavers. They built a mighty empire by forming an alliance with dragons. Only those who wear this medal will be recognized by the dragons!
|fame=18
|art=18
|fth=29
|civ=10
|tech=15
|ss1=Activates the Red Dragon Egg<br>Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +2
|ss2=Activates the Red Dragon Egg<br>Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +4
|ss3=Activates the Red Dragon Egg<br>Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6
|ss4=Activates the Red Dragon Egg<br>Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6
|ss7=Activates the Red Dragon Egg<br>Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6<br> (Awakened)
}}
